specific_question: How did MediConn Solutions celebrate Telehealth Awareness Month in May 2025 to highlight the crucial role of AI technology in its ITSM?
answer: The company organized an online health fair conducted by telemedicine practitioners featuring a live Q&A session specifically about about AI-technology and ITSM, and how it could increase patient satisfaction.
